channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Celeb-Loved Juicy Couture T-Shirts Are On Sale for $8 Right Now (If You Hurry)
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to our podcast, where we dive into the latest trends and deals. Today, we're talking about a blast from the past: Juicy Couture. This iconic LA-based brand has been making a comeback, thanks to the Y2K trend resurgence and influencer love. From Paris Hilton to Beyoncé, Juicy Couture has been a favorite among celebrities for decades. And now, you can get in on the action with an amazing deal on Amazon."
[Short music transition]
Host: "Amazon is offering a five-pack of Juicy Couture cap sleeve T-shirts for just $38.24. That's 15% off the original price of $44.99. These tees are part of the 'Juicy Sport' line, made from super soft and breathable fabric with a touch of spandex for easy movement. They're perfect for a workout or just pairing with your everyday outfit. And with the crop top look, you'll be rocking the Y2K aesthetic in no time."
[Short music transition]
Host: "The best part? Each tee works out to less than $8. That's a steal for a brand name like Juicy Couture. You can choose from different color combinations, and the tees are available in sizes small to XXL. If you don't need five, Amazon also has a three-pack option for just $29.74. And if you're looking for a bag to match, check out this mini duffle bag on sale for 43% off."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "All of these picks are officially licensed Juicy Couture products, sold through Amazon's storefront. But remember, these sale prices can end at any time, so act fast to get your Juicy Couture fix. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you in the next episode!"
